title: Command: Chorus
description: Use the /chorus command to teleport entities randomly like a chorus fruit.
body:
Adds a new `/chorus` command to the game that randomly teleports entities like a chorus fruit.

Command Examples:
- `/chorus` chorus fruit teleports the player who used the command
- `/chorus @a` chorus fruit teleports all players
- `/chorus Steve 0.5` 50% chance to chorus fruit teleport Steve

This command requires a permission level of 2 (Operator)
